3.2.0.title: VSRO History Sources
3.2.0.description: The public Global History (yell chat) and Unique History (kills/spawns) pages can now be powered on VSRO through configurable sources: pick a database and table, map its columns onto the fields the frontend expects, optionally left-join another table (e.g. _Char) to resolve names and avatars, and preview the result with a live test output — no frontend changes required. iSRO keeps using the standard log tables.

features.title: Configurable Global History Source
features.description: New 'Global History (VSRO)' page under Settings to choose a connection and table, load its columns and map them onto Comment, EventTime, CharName, CharID and RefObjID.

features.title: Configurable Unique History Source
features.description: New 'Unique History (VSRO)' page mapping your unique-log columns onto Value, EventTime, killer (CharName16/CharID/RefObjID) and AreaName, so /history/uniques works on VSRO.

features.title: Kill / Spawn Handling
features.description: Map an event-type column plus a 'kill value' to drive the Killed/Spawned badge; leave it unmapped to treat every logged row as a kill.

features.title: Optional Left Join
features.description: Join a second table (e.g. _Char) — including across databases on the same SQL Server instance — to resolve names, IDs and avatars from an id stored in your source table.

features.title: Live Test Output
features.description: Preview the first rows of the mapped query against the current (unsaved) settings before enabling it, with clear guidance when the source or a required mapping is missing.

features.title: Frontend Unchanged
features.description: A shared query builder returns the same fields the views already use, so the History pages, globals widget and character panel work on VSRO without any template changes.

3.1.9.title: Web Account Ban
3.1.9.description: Admins can now ban a user from the website independently of the in-game block. Banned users can no longer log in on the frontend, and the status is manageable and filterable in the admin user list.

features.title: Web Ban Toggle
features.description: New 'Banned from Web' toggle (with optional reason) on the admin user edit page, separate from the in-game block.

features.title: Login Enforcement
features.description: A new 'banned' middleware plus a login-time check prevent banned users from signing in and log out any user banned mid-session, with a translated message in all 8 frontend languages.

features.title: Table Filter & Column
features.description: The admin user list now has a Web Ban status column and a ternary filter (All / Banned only / Not banned).

3.1.8.title: Voting Package Update
3.1.8.description: Updated the Voting package to version 1.0.4

features.title: Postback Handling Improvements
features.description: Enhanced the postback controller to resolve user IDs more reliably and log warnings for missing users.

3.1.7.title: Character Globals Panel
3.1.7.description: The character ranking profile now shows a panel with the global (yell) messages that character has sent, with a friendly notice when there are none. Translated into all languages. iSRO only.

features.title: Globals on Character Profile
features.description: New <x-character-globals> panel on /ranking/characters/{name} listing that character's latest global messages with timestamps.

features.title: Empty-State Notice
features.description: When a character has never sent a global, a clear hint is shown instead of an empty box.

features.title: Full Translations
features.description: Panel title and notice translated in all 8 languages (ar, de, en, es, fr, it, pt, tr).

features.title: Template Styling
features.description: Styled for the base views and every bundled template; override components/character-globals.blade.php to customise. iSRO only for now.

3.1.6.title: Globals Widget Directive
3.1.6.description: New @globalsWidget Blade directive that renders the latest global (yell) chat messages as a responsive card, usable in the sidebar or main area of any template (and the root views). iSRO only.

features.title: @globalsWidget Directive
features.description: Drop the latest globals into any template with @globalsWidget or @globalsWidget(5); also available as <x-globals-widget :limit="8" />.

features.title: Character Links
features.description: Each sender links to its ranking profile at /ranking/characters/{name}.

features.title: Template Styling
features.description: Ships styled versions for the base views and every bundled template; override components/globals-widget.blade.php to customise.

features.title: iSRO Only
features.description: Renders nothing on vSRO; a configurable custom source is planned for later.

3.1.5.title: Page Settings Cluster
3.1.5.description: Page Settings moved from one overloaded tabbed page into a cluster — every section (General, Silkroad Online, Fake Players, Design, ...) is now its own sub-page with a dedicated sidebar entry. License-only pages stay visible as a blurred, read-only preview instead of being hidden.

3.1.4.title: Global History
3.1.4.description: New public History page showing the latest global (yell) chat messages. iSRO only, toggleable in Page Settings and themed for every template. The History menu is now a dropdown with Unique and Globals sub-pages.

features.title: Global History Page
features.description: New /history/globals page listing recent global chat messages with sender and date, paginated.

features.title: History Sub-Menu
features.description: The History navigation entry is now a dropdown with Unique and Globals, matching the Rankings menu.

features.title: Page Settings Toggle
features.description: Enable or disable the Global History from the Features tab in Page Settings (iSRO only, on by default).

features.title: Template Support
features.description: Custom styled views for neon-strike, silkroad-gaming, gilded-path and aether-gate, plus the base template.

3.1.3.title: Gold Stats & Adding / Removing Update
3.1.3.description: In the Dashboard widget, the average gold stat now shows the maximum gold value as well. Also, the Add/Remove Gold buttons on the character view page now update the displayed gold amount immediately after submission.

features.title: Average Gold Stat
features.description: The average character gold stat in the Dashboard widget now shows the maximum gold value as well.

features.title: Add/Remove Gold Update
features.description: The Add/Remove Gold buttons on the character view page now update the displayed gold amount immediately after submission.

3.1.2.title: Unique Tracker
3.1.2.description: New public History page showing the latest unique monster kills and spawns. iSRO only, toggleable in Page Settings and themed for every template.

features.title: Unique History Page
features.description: New /history/uniques page listing recent unique kills and spawns with killer, area and status, paginated and cached.

features.title: Kill/Spawn Filter
features.description: Live toggle to switch between kills only and kills plus spawns.

features.title: Page Settings Toggle
features.description: Enable or disable the Unique Tracker from the Features tab in Page Settings (iSRO only, on by default).

features.title: Template Support
features.description: Custom styled views for neon-strike, silkroad-gaming, gilded-path and aether-gate, plus the base template.

3.1.1.title: Fake Player Count
3.1.1.description: Licensed users can add a stable, randomised offset to the public online player count via new range rules in Page Settings.

features.title: Fake Player Settings
features.description: New license-gated tab in Page Settings to define real-to-fake player count range rules with a global toggle.

features.title: Stable Offset
features.description: The fake offset stays consistent within a configurable time window (default 10 minutes) and never changes the real server count.

3.1.0.title: trustProxies & CVE
3.1.0.description: Changed trustProxies to wildcard and fixed some CVEs

features.title: Cloudflare
features.description: Closed Ticket #27

3.0.8.title: Composer packages upgraded
3.0.8.description: upgraded composer packages to latest versions

3.0.7.title: HipoPay Payment Gateway
3.0.7.description: added a minor fix to the redirect url

3.0.6.title: Readable Ranking URLs
3.0.6.description: Character and guild ranking pages now use name-based slugs in the URL instead of raw database IDs, with old numeric links still working.

features.title: Character Slug URLs
features.description: /ranking/characters/{id} links now use the character name as a slug, e.g. /ranking/characters/devsome, falling back to the numeric ID when needed.

features.title: Guild Slug URLs
features.description: /ranking/guilds/{id} links now use the guild name as a slug, e.g. /ranking/guilds/devguild, falling back to the numeric ID when needed.

features.title: Backwards Compatible
features.description: Existing bookmarked or shared links using the numeric character/guild ID continue to resolve correctly.

3.0.5.title: .env Editor
3.0.5.description: Added a secure, permission-gated .env editor to the admin topbar so server configuration can be changed without SSH or FTP access.

features.title: Edit .env Button
features.description: New topbar icon visible only to Administrators, opening a password-confirmed editor for the application's .env file.

features.title: Password Re-Confirmation
features.description: Requires re-entering the account password before the editor opens, reusing Laravel's standard password-confirmation session window.

features.title: Direct File Read/Write
features.description: Loads the current .env contents on open and writes changes straight back to disk, with clear error handling if the file isn't writable.

3.0.4.title: Cache Management Widget
3.0.4.description: Added a quick cache-clear and optimize button to the admin topbar, plus a new player level distribution chart on the dashboard.

features.title: Clear Cache Button
features.description: Topbar button with confirmation modal to clear application, config, view, and route caches without leaving the page.

features.title: Optimize Button
features.description: Runs php artisan optimize directly from the same modal to cache the app for production.

features.title: Player Level Distribution Widget
features.description: Dashboard bar chart showing character counts grouped by 10-level ranges, using the configured level cap or the highest character level.

3.0.3.title: updated composer.lock and added version numbers to package composer.json files
3.0.3.description: Updated composer.lock with latest package versions and added explicit version numbers to each package's composer.json for better clarity and dependency management.

3.0.2.title: VSRO Compatibility & Item Name Translation
3.0.2.description: Full VSRO server support for Monster Drops — no more SQL errors, item names now resolved via _ItemNameDesc just like the Items page.

features.title: VSRO SQL Fix
features.description: Removed cross-database join to SILKROAD_R_ACCOUNT.dbo._Rigid_ItemNameDesc which does not exist on VSRO servers.

features.title: Item Name Translation on VSRO
features.description: Drop table item names are now resolved via _ItemNameDesc (same source as the Items page), showing real English names instead of CodeName128.

features.title: Monster Name Fallback
features.description: Monster display names fall back to CodeName128 on VSRO since _ItemNameDesc does not contain monster name entries.

3.0.1.title: Monster Drops & Item Detail Fixes
3.0.1.description: Drop system overhaul with correct tiered pool support, improved monster drop statistics, and fixed gender display on item detail pages.

features.title: Tiered Drop Pools
features.description: Monster drops now correctly load from _RefDropItemAssign (potions, elixirs, scrolls, alchemy) in addition to named item groups.

features.title: Drop Statistics Overview
features.description: Replaced Notable Monsters with a drop system breakdown showing named pools, tiered pools, and monster assignment stats.

features.title: Item Gender Fix
features.description: Fixed gender display on item detail pages — correct Female/Male mapping with matching pink/blue colors.

3.0.0.title: World Map, Tickets & Referrals
3.0.0.description: Major release with interactive world map, support ticket system, referral rewards, and a revamped dashboard.

features.title: Interactive World Map
features.description: Displays online player positions in real time.

features.title: Support Ticket System
features.description: Categories, priority levels, and admin replies.

features.title: Referral System
features.description: Configurable validation and automatic Silk distribution.

features.title: Revamped Dashboard
features.description: Silk balance, character info, and event timers.

features.title: Silkroad Gaming Theme
features.description: New theme with light/dark toggle and BBCode editor.

2.0.0.title: Templates, Payments & Localization
2.0.0.description: Complete template architecture, 8-language support, and multiple payment provider integrations.

features.title: Template System
features.description: Modular theme architecture with a bundled basic theme.

features.title: 8 Languages
features.description: Arabic, German, English, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, Turkish.

features.title: Donations & Payments
features.description: Fawaterk, Maxicard, and other payment providers.

features.title: Voting Plugin
features.description: Integrated voting with reward distribution.

features.title: Page Management
features.description: Translatable pages and guild & inventory features.

1.0.0.title: Initial Release
1.0.0.description: Modern foundation for managing Silkroad web projects with a clean, modular architecture.

features.title: Web Installer
features.description: Streamlined setup wizard for new installations.

features.title: Modular Package System
features.description: Extend functionality via installable packages.

features.title: Developer-Friendly
features.description: Clean, maintainable codebase built on Laravel.
